query:
INSERT INTO players (userId, deviceId, name, email, type, isPremium, lastActivityAt, createdAt)
SELECT NULL, deviceId, name, email, 'anonymous', isPremium, NOW(), createdAt
FROM users
WHERE deviceId IS NOT NULL AND loginMethod = 'device'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE lastActivityAt = NOW();
